<p class="key-answer" data-question="Eltrombopag 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Eltrombopag</strong> 目前有 <strong>27 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Eltrombopag 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Revolade is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with primary immune thrombocytopenia (ITP) who are refractory to other treatments (e.g. corticosteroids, immunoglobulins) (see sections 4.2...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HIV infectious disease（99.3%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（98.8%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（98.8%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>obsolete familial combined hyperlipidemia（98.0%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（97.6%）</li>
<li>AIDS（97.1%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（96.8%）</li>
<li>cholecystolithiasis（96.1%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis（95.9%）</li>
<li>oral candidiasis（95.6%）</li>
<li>commissural lip fistula（95.3%）</li>
<li>osteoradionecrosis of the mandible（95.3%）</li>
<li>oral leukoedema（95.2%）</li>
<li>burning mouth syndrome（95.2%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis (disease)（95.2%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（94.7%）</li>
<li>congenital human immunodeficiency virus（94.7%）</li>
<li>AIDS related complex（94.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
